race.comment: WHO'S IN DEV (14) returned with a 1L at this track over 1220m leading until the shadows of the post. Brought promising form to that and the step up to 1400m is ideal. In the right race and is sure to prove hard to beat. JOEJOE (8) missed the frame on debut then progressed nicely when beaten a long neck at the end of 1430m at Hobart. Fitter again and he's a big threat. SURF SOUL (5) was in the money two starts back at this track but couldn't back it up last time beaten 2.5 lengths at Hobart over 1600m. Has his share of ability and will be hitting the line. GENUINE LADY (15) is third-up and ready to show more like her best. Has been kept up to the mark with a near miss in a Longford trial and draws low with Luke Currie replacing the apprentice.
